title: ilex tugitakayamensis
intro: Ilex tugitakayamensis, also known as Tugitaka Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Ilex tugitakayamensis is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Ilex tugitakayamensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and its leaves are used in traditional remedies.
